channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California, killing all 8 crew aboard
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- 8 people died in B-52 bomber crash at US Air Force base in Southern California, officials say
- Eight presumed dead after B-52 bomber crashes at U.S. Air Force base in California
- Eight people killed in US Air Force B-52 bomber crash: What we know
- Eight dead in fiery US B-52 bomber crash in California
- US B-52 bomber crashes after take-off, killing eight in California
- What is the B-52 bomber that crashed at a U.S. air base in California?
- Eight dead after US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California
- US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in flames in California, killing all 8 crew aboard
- Eight killed in US Air Force B-52 bomber crash in California
- 8 feared dead in B-52 bomber crash in California
- US B-52 Strategic Bomber Crash Leaves Eight Dead
- Eight dead in B-52 bomber crash at California air base
- 8 people dead after B-52 bomber crashes at US military base
- US Air Force B-52 crashes in California
- US B-52 bomber crashes in California, killing all 8 crew aboard; aerials show aftermath of crash]]>
